globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://sure-anchor.azurewebsites.net; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
